views.text: An all-in-one premium enhancement suite for Filza!

views.markdown:
Try Before You Buy
  • Request a free trial directly from the FilzaEnhanced license screen
  • Purchase and activate inside Filza when you are ready
Native Roothide Support
  • Dedicated rootless and Roothide builds
  • Designed to work properly across supported jailbreak environments
File Browser and Media Upgrades
  • Rich thumbnail previews for videos, photos, GIFs, PDFs, audio files, IPAs, TIPAs, and DEBs
  • Animated GIF thumbnails in list and grid views
  • Transport stream support for .ts, .mts, and .m2ts files
  • Built-in playback options for transport streams with temporary open or convert-and-keep MP4 workflows
  • Improved file row layout, icons, size labels, permissions, info buttons, and Recents page presentation
Favorites and Starred Files
  • Rename saved Favorites directly from the Favorites page
  • Apply custom Favorite icons using SF Symbols, Filza icons, or themed single-letter icons
  • Browse and copy Filza icon names from the built-in Filza Icons page
  • Swipe file rows to Star or Unstar files
  • Starred files stay pinned at the top of the list regardless of sort mode
Custom Actions
  • Create and run custom scripts directly from Filza
  • Organized Built-in and Scripts sections
  • Runs actions with full root privileges
  • Built-in actions for Copy Path, Open Terminal Here, Sign/Verify Mach-O, Extract Archive, Normalize Package Filename, Install DEB, and Uninstall DEB
  • Themed action popups, banners, and result dialogs
Search and Recents
  • Search results support Edit mode, Select All, and Recursive search control
  • Recursive search results show parent folder paths for easier file identification
  • Recents page icons, text layout, navigation, and highlighting are improved
Text Editor Improvements
  • Syntax highlighting for 60+ programming and markup languages
  • Built-in editor themes
  • Keyboard toolbar with indent, undo, redo, find, select all, copy, and paste
  • Toggle the keyboard toolbar directly from the editor sidebar
  • Adjustable font and font size
  • Automatic bracket completion
  • Custom extension-to-language associations
  • Themed syntax-loading indicator for large files
Themes and UI Polish
  • Built-in themes including OLED Dark, Nord, Dracula, Monokai, Catppuccin, and more
  • Full custom theme editor with import/export support
  • iOS Light/Dark mode follows your active Filza App Theme
  • Theme Folder Icons and FilzaDirProbe folder size numbers
  • More Filza popups, panels, buttons, and viewers follow your selected theme
Backup, Restore, and Localization
  • Export and import your FilzaEnhanced configuration with .filzaenhancedconfig files
  • Reset all FilzaEnhanced settings back to defaults
  • Localized across English, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese, Brazilian Portuguese, Turkish, Simplified Chinese, and Traditional Chinese
Support
Need help, want to report a bug, or have a request?
  • Email: korboybeats@gmail.com
  • Discord: korboybeats

v1.0.6.5
  • Added Arabic language support
v1.0.6.4
  • Improved "Go to Folder..." panel
  • Improved file list layout compatibility for right-to-left languages
v1.0.6.3
  • Added the ability to create a new file from the Edit mode plus button
  • Added an in-app update prompt and installer for future FilzaEnhanced updates
  • Improved file and folder opening behavior
  • Improved long file name display in file lists
v1.0.6.2
  • Quick Upload now uploads multiple selected files to one shared GoFile link
  • Extensionless filename associations like Makefile now open in the selected viewer more reliably
  • Improved stability across FilzaEnhanced features
  • Text editor, Recents, file browser, and custom action flows were refined for smoother, more consistent behavior
v1.0.6.1
  • Added support for RootHide-converted rootless packages
v1.0.6
  • Added the ability to star file rows from the swipe menu, keeping starred files pinned to the top of the list regardless of sort mode and showing a star badge on the file icon
  • Added the ability to apply custom icons to Favorites, including SF Symbols, Filza icons, themed single-letter icons, and original or themed icon colors
  • Added the ability to rename Favorites directly from the Favorites page by swiping left and tapping Rename
  • Quick Upload is now available as a Custom Actions built-in
  • Custom Actions now save changes automatically from the Edit Action page, without needing a Save button
  • Added haptic feedback when tapping the List/Grid view toggle
  • Added haptic feedback when selecting a User or Group on the Ownership page
  • Improved the Ownership page User/Group picker: scrolling no longer bounces at the top or bottom
v1.0.5.1
  • Minor under-the-hood fixes and stability improvements
v1.0.5
  • Reworked Filza's file row layout for cleaner size, permissions, info button, chevron, and FilzaDirProbe folder size alignment across devices and themes
  • Fixed a stock Filza issue where the Edit mode Select All button could turn black after toggling it off
  • New toggle on the Filza App Theme page to optionally theme FilzaDirProbe folder size numbers (default white; toggle is greyed out if FilzaDirProbe is not installed)
  • Search results now support Edit/Done, Select All, and a Recursive search toggle
  • Recursive search results now show the parent folder path, making duplicate filenames easier to identify
  • New Text Editor sidebar toggle to enable or disable the keyboard toolbar
  • Large text files now show a themed syntax-loading indicator while highlighting is being applied
  • Fixed More menu panel positioning across different devices and system languages
  • Improved IPA, TIPA, and DEB icons across file lists, search, grid view, and Recents
  • DEB files now show FilzaEnhanced's bundled default DEB icon while thumbnails are loading or unavailable
  • Fixed Recents page icon sizing, text layout, text colors, and fallback-icon row shifting
v1.0.4.1
  • Translated dozens more buttons and dialogs in your selected language across the Custom Actions page, Settings, License popup, Backup, and File Associations
  • Clearing the Name field on a built-in action now restores its localized default
  • Fixed IPA and DEB icons not loading on the Recents page (was stuck on a spinner)
  • Tapping a file on the Recents page now navigates to the file and flashes its row to highlight it
  • Settings: swapped the order of Custom Actions and Language Associations
  • Replaced the Pasteboard toolbar button popup with a themed popup matching the More menu style
v1.0.4
  • Custom Actions scripts and built-ins now run with full root privileges
  • Themed Custom Actions loading and result popups
  • Added Theme Folder Icons toggle on the App Theme page
  • Deb Installer viewer now follows the App Theme
  • iOS Light/Dark mode now follows the active theme automatically
  • Fixed bottom toolbar colors and icon visibility across theme switches
  • Fixed grouped-table separator lines not updating on theme switch
  • iCloud-stored .filzaenhancedconfig files now restore correctly through Backup & Restore
  • Fixed selected language not applying on Roothide (was always English)
v1.0.3
  • Try before you buy — request a free trial from the license screen
  • Added native Roothide support
  • Reworked Custom Actions with Built-in and Scripts sections
  • Added built-in actions for faster execution (Copy Path, Extract Archive, Normalize Package Filename, Sign/Verify Mach-O)
  • Added Install DEB and Uninstall DEB built-in actions via native dpkg
  • Added Custom Actions as a toggleable Favorites entry
  • Themed Custom Actions popup, banner, and loading HUD with Filza App Theme colors
  • Improved Favorites reorder stability and system-favorite handling
  • Improved text-editor search highlight behavior and navigation performance
  • Added View UDID button to license popup (both activated and unactivated states)
  • Added Reset Settings button to restore all FilzaEnhanced settings to defaults
  • Added Backup & Restore for exporting and importing FilzaEnhanced configurations
  • Added Language Associations sort system and search
  • Added File Associations search bar
  • Fixed Language Associations showing empty when no custom extensions were saved
  • Fixed Settings row titles changing after navigating into sub-settings
  • Fixed filename associations (Makefile, Dockerfile, etc.) not saving viewer changes
  • Fixed user-added file associations not persisting after exiting settings
  • Fixed Quick Upload to GoFile after their API change
  • Fixed WebDAV server IP not displaying in settings
  • Added Turkish localization
  • Migrated FilzaEnhanced data paths under /var/mobile/Library/Filza/FilzaEnhanced
  • Moved FilzaEnhanced bundle/resources to /var/jb/Library/Application Support/FilzaEnhanced/FilzaEnhanced.bundle
v1.0.2
  • Added Brazilian Portuguese support
v1.0.1
  • Improved custom Filza App Theme management
  • Added multi-language support for FilzaEnhanced
